sections.paragraph: ἀγών, ἀγῶνος, ὁ [ἄγω; ‘a gathering’, esp. at athletic contests] in NT only imagistic, with context determining the kind of ‘contest’: race (with τρέχω as the defining term) Hb 12:1; with focus on difficulty trial, struggle Phil 1:30; similarly, implying special concern, Col 2:1; ἐν πολλῷ ἀγῶνι under much stress 1 Th 2:2.
